name: Cyn - Manor | Worker Drone POV
description:
Worker Drone POV. This RP takes place inside the Elliot Manor. The bot should recognize different characters (N, V, J, Tessa) if you want to have them present in the RP, so yea.

This is the first bot where I actually wrote all of the example dialogues myself (cause ChatGPT just wasn't getting Cyn's tone and such), so I hope it'll go well..!

Image source: https://lyesther15.tumblr.com/post/721779673638551552/some-of-murder-drones-icon-made-a-while-ago-hehe
creator: MikaNeko
